name: martianmobile
description: Martian Mobile's public Claude Code plugins — quant research and trading-ops tooling, sanitized from internal workflows.

plugins.name: strategy-evaluation
plugins.description: Evaluate trading-strategy backtests. First capability: convergence analysis across a variant sweep (ship / iterate / kill), with the numbers behind the verdict. Extensible to robustness, walk-forward, and regime evaluators.
